evals.prompt: 我需要把 Petstore 的 Swagger 页面转成 Markdown 文档，URL 是 https://petstore.swagger.io
evals.expected_output: Agent uses web-scraper openapi command to discover and convert the OpenAPI spec from Swagger UI to structured Markdown with endpoints, parameters, and schemas

evals.prompt: 帮我分析一下 https://cn.vuejs.org 这个文档站的结构，看看有哪些页面
evals.expected_output: Agent uses web-scraper discover command to detect VitePress framework and list all navigation links

evals.prompt: I need to pull down all the API docs from https://docs.example.com and save them as a single markdown file
evals.expected_output: Agent uses web-scraper fetch command with --auto --merge flags to discover all pages and merge into a single markdown file

evals.prompt: 帮我把飞书开放平台的这个 API 文档读取出来 https://open.feishu.cn/document/server-docs/im-v1/message/create
evals.expected_output: Agent recognizes this is a SPA page and uses web-scraper fetch command. Output should contain API parameters, request/response schemas, and Chinese content

evals.prompt: I tried reading https://open.feishu.cn/document/server-docs/application-scope/scope-list with read_url_content but got almost nothing back. Can you help me get the actual content?
evals.expected_output: Agent recognizes read_url_content failure as SPA signal and falls back to web-scraper fetch command for full JS-rendered content extraction

evals.prompt: 这个文档站用的什么框架？https://docusaurus.io/docs
evals.expected_output: Agent uses web-scraper discover --framework-only to detect Docusaurus framework

evals.prompt: 把这几个页面的内容都抓下来合并成一个文件：https://cn.vuejs.org/api/composition-api-setup.html 和 https://cn.vuejs.org/api/reactivity-core.html
evals.expected_output: Agent creates a URL list file, then uses web-scraper fetch --from-file with --merge to batch fetch and merge the pages
